Here is the translation of your code and text into English. I've translated the titles, descriptions, buttons, markdown text, and even the CSS comments for consistency:

````html
---
title: "Tutorials"
---

```{=html}
<style>
  /* --- Climate Forest Theme: Tutorial Grid --- */

  :root {
    --cf-bg-page: #F1F8E9;         /* Page background (Soft mint) */
    --cf-card-bg: #FFFFFF;         /* Card background */
    --cf-primary: #2E7D32;         /* Forest Green (Titles, Borders) */
    --cf-secondary: #558B2F;       /* Leaf Green (Icons) */
    --cf-accent: #EF6C00;          /* Burnt Orange (Buttons/Badges) */
    --cf-text-main: #1B5E20;       /* Dark text */
    --cf-text-light: #52665A;      /* Description text */
    --cf-shadow: 0 10px 30px -10px rgba(46, 125, 50, 0.15);
  }

  /* Layout */
  .tutorial-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr));
    gap: 2rem;
    padding: 2rem 0;
    font-family: 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
  }

  /* Card Styles */
  .tutorial-card {
    background: var(--cf-card-bg);
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 2rem;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    border: 1px solid rgba(46, 125, 50, 0.1);
    border-left: 5px solid var(--cf-primary); /* Elegant side detail */
    box-shadow: var(--cf-shadow);
    transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.8, 0.25, 1);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .tutorial-card:hover {
    transform: translateY(-6px);
    box-shadow: 0 15px 35px -10px rgba(46, 125, 50, 0.25);
    border-color: var(--cf-secondary);
  }

  /* Header & Icons */
  .card-header {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: flex-start;
    margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
  }

  .card-icon {
    color: var(--cf-secondary);
    background-color: #E8F5E9;
    padding: 10px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
  }

  .card-badge {
    background-color: var(--cf-bg-page);
    color: var(--cf-primary);
    font-size: 0.7rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
    padding: 4px 10px;
    border-radius: 20px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    border: 1px solid rgba(46, 125, 50, 0.2);
  }

  /* Content */
  .card-title {
    color: var(--cf-text-main);
    font-size: 1.35rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin: 0 0 0.75rem 0;
    line-height: 1.2;
  }

  .card-description {
    color: var(--cf-text-light);
    font-size: 0.95rem;
    line-height: 1.6;
    flex-grow: 1;
    margin-bottom: 2rem;
  }

  /* Action Button */
  .card-cta-button {
    background-color: var(--cf-primary);
    color: white !important; /* Forces white color in case the site theme overrides it */
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    text-align: center;
    text-decoration: none;
    padding: 12px 20px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    transition: background-color 0.2s ease, transform 0.2s ease;
    align-self: flex-start; /* Left-aligned button */
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
  }

  .card-cta-button:hover {
    background-color: var(--cf-secondary);
    text-decoration: none;
    transform: translateX(4px);
  }
  
  /* SVG Fix */
  .tutorial-card svg {
    width: 24px;
    height: 24px;
  }

</style>

<div class="tutorial-grid">

  <div class="tutorial-card">
    <div class="card-header">
      <div class="card-icon">
        <svg xmlns="[http://www.w3.org/2000/svg](http://www.w3.org/2000/svg)" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M13 10V3L4 14h7v7l9-11h-7z" /></svg>
      </div>
      <span class="card-badge">Essential</span>
    </div>
    <h3 class="card-title">Introductory Tutorial</h3>
    <p class="card-description">Learn the complete workflow: from package installation to time series creation. Ideal for beginners with no prior experience.</p>
    <a href="[https://bymaxanjos.github.io/climasus4r/pt/articles/tutorial_introducao.html](https://bymaxanjos.github.io/climasus4r/pt/articles/tutorial_introducao.html)" class="card-cta-button">Start Now →</a>
  </div>

  <div class="tutorial-card">
    <div class="card-header">
      <div class="card-icon">
        <svg xmlns="[http://www.w3.org/2000/svg](http://www.w3.org/2000/svg)" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M4 7v10c0 2.21 3.58 4 8 4s8-1.79 8-4V7M4 7c0 2.21 3.58 4 8 4s8-1.79 8-4M4 7c0-2.21 3.58-4 8-4s8 1.79 8 4m0 5c0 2.21-3.58 4-8 4s-8-1.79-8-4" /></svg>
      </div>
      <span class="card-badge">RAPs</span>
    </div>
    <h3 class="card-title">Reproducible Analytical Pipelines (RAPs)</h3>
    <p class="card-description">Presents four practical case studies demonstrating the power and flexibility of the `climasus4r` package for epidemiological analysis using RAPs.</p>
    <a href="[https://bymaxanjos.github.io/climasus4r/pt/articles/tutorial_estudos_casos.html](https://bymaxanjos.github.io/climasus4r/pt/articles/tutorial_estudos_casos.html)" class="card-cta-button">View Tutorial →</a>
  </div>

</div>
````

-----

## 🌲 Do you have feedback or suggestions?

Do you have any ideas for improvement or did you find a bug? We would love to hear from you\! Click the button below to open a new *issue* on GitHub and share your suggestions directly with us.

\<a href='https://github.com/ByMaxAnjos/climasus4r/issues/new'\>
\<button type="button" class="btn" style="background-color: \#3BB273; color: white; padding: 10px 20px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: bold; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.3s;"\>
Open an issue on GitHub
\</button\>
\</a\>
